# Syntra Systems

> Syntra designs and builds custom Business Operating Systems that connect
> fragmented business operations — inventory, sales, purchasing, scheduling,
> CRM, customer conversations, and AI co-pilots — into one intelligent platform.

Syntra Systems is a B2B software studio specializing in custom business
operating systems, workflow automation software, and AI integration for
small and mid-sized operations (auto repair shops, retail, distribution,
and professional services). Every system is architected to the client's
real workflows rather than shipped as a generic template.

## Core Offerings

- **Business Operations Platforms**: Synchronize inventory tracking, sales,
  purchasing workflows, scheduling, CRM, and live reporting into a single
  source of truth.
- **Workflow Automation**: Remove repetitive manual work across operations so
  teams stop acting as the integration layer between disconnected tools.
- **Omnichannel Customer Communication**: Connect customer conversations across
  every channel, including a WhatsApp Business messaging agent.
- **AI Integration**: Custom-configured local or cloud AI assistants that answer
  business questions in natural language using real company data.

## Pricing

- **Strategy Session**: Complimentary. Operations audit, gap analysis, and
  system architecture review.
- **Core Plan**: $297/mo (+ $250 setup). Real-time inventory, sales and
  purchase orders, and a quotation builder with live USD-to-MXN exchange rates.
- **Pro Plan**: $397/mo (+ $450 setup). Everything in Core plus a WhatsApp
  Business messaging agent and an AI-powered quotation assistant.
- **Bespoke Systems**: From $7,398 one-time (no recurring fees). Fully custom-
  architected operating systems with full source code ownership.

## Case Study

- **Independent Auto Repair Shop (Digital Transformation)**: Replaced Excel
  spreadsheets, manual phone scheduling, and hand-tracked inventory with a
  unified operating platform featuring automated scheduling, real-time
  inventory, AI-powered business intelligence, and live USD→MXN parts pricing.

## Founders

- **Ana Algernon Luján** — Co-Founder & Strategy Lead. Operations strategy,
  client consulting, and process design. Bilingual and cross-cultural.
- **Pierpaolo Tilli** — Co-Founder & Systems Architect. Two decades in
  telecommunications and systems architecture, PMP-certified, with expertise
  in AI agent architecture, AWS, and automation frameworks.

## FAQ

- **Payments & billing**: Core and Pro are billed monthly with a one-time setup
  fee; Bespoke systems are a fixed project price split into milestone payments.
  Final pricing is confirmed after a Strategy Session.
- **Post-sales support**: Core includes email support, Pro includes priority
  support. Bespoke projects include 60 days of post-launch support with optional
  ongoing maintenance. Training and documentation are always included at handoff.
- **Lifecycle & updates**: Subscriptions receive continuous updates; Bespoke
  systems are built for longevity with optional maintenance and expansion.
- **Ownership**: With Core and Pro, Syntra owns and operates the platform while
  the customer always owns their business data (exportable at any time). With
  Bespoke, the customer owns everything — platform and source code — and chooses
  who handles maintenance (Syntra, in-house, or a third party).
- **Contract terms**: Subscriptions start with an initial 6–12 month term
  (depending on customization and integrations), then renew in shorter
  three-month periods. Bespoke projects run under a scoped milestone agreement.
- **Timeline**: Subscriptions provision quickly; Bespoke projects run from a few
  weeks to a few months following Discovery → Design → Integration → Deployment.
- **Integrations**: Syntra connects existing tools (spreadsheets, CRMs,
  messaging) and builds custom infrastructure only where gaps exist.
- **Security**: Encrypted daily backups, role-based access control, HTTPS with
  authenticated sessions, and cloud or on-premises deployment.

- Book a strategy session: https://syntra.build (see "Schedule a Call")
